$comment: Single source of truth for AI apps the governance stack recognizes. Drives whitelist, cost-parser dispatch, process attribution, browser-extension overlays, and dashboard grouping. Onboarding a new app = one block here. Unknown apps fall through to the shape-based detector in cost-parser.js and surface in the dashboard's Discovery tray.

schema.id: stable kebab-case identifier (do not change once shipped)
schema.name: display name shown in dashboard
schema.category: api-platform | cli-agent | ide-assistant | autonomous-agent | chat-frontend | local-runtime
schema.sandbox: local | remote | mixed  -- where the agent's ACTIONS run (matters for action governance)
schema.wireFormat: anthropic | openai | openai-compatible | google | passthrough  -- which parser handles the body
schema.apiDomains: [] domains that serve API traffic; always MITM-intercepted
schema.webDomains: [] domains that serve a web UI; intercepted only when the source process is a known AI desktop app, otherwise bridged so browsers do not break
schema.processes: [] process basenames (lowercased, no extension) used for attribution
schema.pinned: true if the vendor pins TLS certs and rejects our CA; forces socket bridge (no body capture from network)
schema.governanceNote: free text shown in dashboard; especially used to flag remote-sandbox visibility gaps

apps.name: OpenAI API
apps.governanceNote: ChatGPT Desktop pins TLS certs; web/desktop body capture relies on browser extension + asar hook, not the proxy.

apps.name: Claude Code
apps.governanceNote: CLI agent; cmdline captured as intent signal. Action-capable (shell + file edits) — combine with auditd/ETW for action governance.

apps.name: Factory.AI
apps.governanceNote: CLI runs locally; Droids run in Factory's cloud sandbox. Sandbox actions invisible from the endpoint.

apps.name: Devin
apps.governanceNote: Agent runs entirely in Cognition's cloud sandbox. We capture inbound prompts and outbound results only; agent's in-sandbox actions (git, shell, network egress) are NOT visible. Procure vendor audit API for full coverage.

apps.name: OpenClaw
apps.governanceNote: Model-agnostic CLI agent; wireFormat is whichever provider's SDK it's using (Anthropic/OpenAI/local). Detection by process + dispatch by destination host.

apps.name: Cline
apps.governanceNote: VS Code extension; uses whichever provider user configures. Detection via destination host (Anthropic/OpenAI/etc.).

apps.name: Replit Agent
apps.governanceNote: Cloud-hosted agent; same boundary-only visibility caveat as Devin.

apps.name: Ollama
apps.governanceNote: Local model runtime on 127.0.0.1:11434. Captured via Tier 2 localhost intercept.

apps.name: vLLM
apps.governanceNote: Local OpenAI-compatible inference server; captured via localhost intercept.

apps.name: llama.cpp
apps.governanceNote: Local inference server; captured via localhost intercept. Standalone CLI binary covered by Tier 3 audit-watch (file open) + GPU watch.
